scripts.sync:gsap: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('path'); const src=p.join('node_modules','gsap','dist'); const dst=p.join('assets','vendor','gsap'); fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); ['gsap.min.js','ScrollTrigger.min.js'].forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f))); console.log('GSAP files synced to assets/vendor/gsap');"
